payload.label: outlet
payload.long_description: Blurry white plastic rectangular duplex outlet faceplate visible near center of the crop; low-contrast and slightly green-tinted, with two plug openings and a faint central screw visible — appears out of focus and somewhat washed-out, likely about 0.8 meters from the camera.
